title: Make the boy
prompt_text: A man wearing a dark blue and white, futuristic-looking suit with a nametag that says 'Sam' and a star emblem is shown from the chest up against a backdrop of Earth seen from space. The Earth is a vibrant blue and white, curving across the lower half of the frame, with a deep black starry sky above. The man has short, styled hair with highlights and is looking directly at the camera with a friendly, slightly surprised expression. His right hand, covered by a black glove, is raised with his index finger pointing upwards. The lighting is bright, illuminating his face and suit, with a slight blue and orange tint on his hair, suggesting artificial light in a space setting. The scene transitions to a smartphone displaying the man's video, showing a 'like' animation and a golden star appearing over the nametag as if reacting to a double tap.

cinematography.cameraShot: Medium shot, eye-level angle, static shot of the man speaking. The second shot is a close-up of a smartphone screen, showing the full video playing within the phone interface.

actions: The man points his right index finger upwards.
The man speaks directly to the camera.
The video transitions to a smartphone screen.
A hand appears from the bottom right of the screen, seemingly interacting with the phone.
A golden star graphic appears and disappears over the 'Sam' nametag on the video playing on the phone, simulating a 'like' or reaction.
dialogue: Man says: I'm way up here above Earth, I wanted to show you something cool. If you're watching this in Sora, there's a little trick.
